td.span: Injury of medial collateral ligament of knee

tr.td: 1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Clopidogrel (as clopidogrel bisulfate) 75 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (20 mg) by mouth once daily
400 micrograms (1 spray) under the tongue as needed for chest pain, repeat every 5 minutes if needed, up to 3 sprays in 15 minutes
Metoprolol tartrate (as metoprolol succinate) 100 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
Ferrous sulfate 325 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
1 tablet (325 mg) by mouth once daily
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Injury of medial collateral ligament of knee (disorder)
Development of individualized plan of care
Surgical manipulation of joint of knee
Injury of medial collateral ligament of knee (disorder)

ul.li: Patient will receive education on lifestyle changes (diet, exercise, sodium reduction, weight management) to support blood pressure control.
Patient will attend diabetes self-management education sessions to improve understanding of prediabetes and lifestyle modifications.
Maintain fasting plasma glucose within recommended range for prediabetes.
Maintain HbA1c below threshold for diabetes diagnosis.

tr.td: Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
